calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-10-2018 Off Calendar

Request For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jan-04-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Gail Dekreon; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Ray Yetka, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, Green Street Studio, LLC.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Bari Latifzada.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Witness WB Coyle sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
An injunction enjoining Bari Latifzada from continuing short term rentals at the subject premises.
$19,213 damages, prejudgment interest of $1782.94, attorneys' fees of $5337.00 and costs of $727.00 for a total judgment of $27,059.94.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2017 Continued To Jan-24-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
